title: amygdalus bovei
intro: Amygdalus bovei, also known as the sweet apricot kernel tree, is a deciduous tree native to the Mediterranean region and Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The kernel of the fruit is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the kernel is often extracted and used as a tincture or oil, while the leaves and bark of the tree are also used to make teas and infusions.
